title: GameStop stock soars after Roaring Kitty reveals 175 million bet on the retailer
text: Keith Gill, known as Roaring Kitty on Reddit, disclosed a major position in GameStop consisting of 9 million shares worth approximately $175 million on June 2, 2024. His disclosure through Reddit posts on r/Superstonk generated significant retail investor enthusiasm. In October 2025, Gill disclosed a $115.7 million stake in GameStop shares and $65.7 million in call options expiring in June 2026. As of June 13, 2024, Gill's position had a value exceeding $260 million. As of May 1, 2026, Keith Gill's GameStop position consisting of 9 million shares is worth approximately $238.77 million. GameStop's Q2 2025 earnings provided fundamental support, with revenue surging 21.8% year-over-year to $972.2 million, well above expectations of $823.2 million, and adjusted EPS coming in at $0.25, crushing estimates of $0.16. His historical comment 'What's Exit Strategy?' from a long-forgotten Reddit post signaled his long-term conviction in the investment thesis.
